title: Corvallis Crypto Club (CCC)
html:
Corvallis Crypto Club (CCC)

The student crypto/blockchain club Yahir orbited at Oregon State in late 2021 and 2022 — one of the cleanest examples of a closed chapter in the corpus. The crypto stretch ran for roughly 12 months across his sophomore-into-junior year, generated several active workstreams (a Coinbase pitch deck, an Oregon Blockchain Group event, $PHIB token brainstorming, the DAO mergers thesis), and then fully evaporated. Per the first batch meta summary: "The 2022 Corvallis-Crypto-Club / Coinbase / DAO-mergers / $PHIB activity has zero echo in 2025-2026 notes. Yahir's attention moved fully to AI between 2023 and 2025."

The earliest CCC-adjacent specimen is 2021 12 05 hey cameron yg thesis on drugs — December 2021, Yahir 19, drafting a follow-up message to "Cameron, this is YG, how are you doing dude. I don't know if you remember, but we met last night talking about crypto." This places him in the late-2021 Corvallis crypto-bull-market scene that fed into the CCC the next year. Same note carries the Mario-Kart-banana drugs thesis, so the crypto-curiosity and the self-monitoring-of-drug-use thread are running in parallel.

The dense moment is 2022 10 25 ahmad jamal stream — Oct 2022, the same junk-drawer note where Yahir is brainstorming jazz, ChatGPT product wedges weeks after launch, and the founder-mantras (voluntary adversity, nonobvious, asking the right question). The CCC workstreams listed there: "Work on the steps for the CCC", the Coinbase slide deck, the DADCO pitch, an Escalate pitch, "$PHIB how to explode PHIB" (his apparent involvement in a memecoin — "Twitter followers / mobile website / LOGOS!!!"), and an Oregon Blockchain Group event. The same note carries Web3 idea seeds: "token-gated websites, digital passports, decentralized Wikipedia, mobile Web3 game not marketed as web3 but as a regular game, join a DAO next cycle." This is peak Yahir-as-crypto-builder.

What's interesting is the "join a DAO next cycle" line — even at the peak of his crypto involvement, Yahir was framing it as cyclical, something to ride during the up-cycle and then sit out. The non-occurrence of any crypto reference after 2023 confirms he honored that read: when the AI cycle started, he switched cleanly. The CCC era is therefore a useful negative-space marker — it shows that Yahir's recurring categories (founder-orgs, building-skill, public pitching) are substrate and the specific technology (crypto in 2022, AI in 2024-2026) is the vehicle. The category persists; the vehicle is interchangeable.

Source summaries

  • 2021 12 05 hey cameron yg thesis on drugs
  • 2022 10 25 ahmad jamal stream
  • first batch 2026 04 26
